title: Lead Front End Engineer
bullets: Bootstrapped Guardian UI using Vue, Nuxt, Typescript, and Scala, then designed and built out a suite of moderation tools, giving customers a UI interface on top of the existing moderation API
Improved Guardian UI design and functionality through research and customer feedback, increasing customer satisfaction and moderation speed
Integrated fp-ts into Guardian UI, making visual bugs nonexistent and leading to a substantial improvement in UI stability
Mentored and guided new team members in front end best practices and code quality, allowing for more work to be distributed to the team
Built out a custom web component library with Stencil.js to speed up and simplify new feature development
Created and maintained audio and text demo apps built with Vue, Python, Flask, and Billboard.js, improving sales team efficiency and increasing conversions
